--- title: "pandas" date: 2025-03-19 categories: ["data mining"] --- ![](/img/human-thumb.jpg){.post-thumbnail} ::: {#35203d31 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import pandas as pd import numpy as np data = { 'name': ['John', 'Anna', 'Peter', 'Linda'], 'location': ['New York', 'Paris', 'Berlin', 'London'], 'age': [24, 13, 53, 33] } df = pd.DataFrame(data) ``` ::: ::: {#29898919 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} df.loc[(df['age'] > 20) & (df['age'] < 50), 'location'] ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ``` 0 New York 3 London Name: location, dtype: object ``` ::: ::: ::: {#116cff61 .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} df = pd.DataFrame(np.random.randn(6, 4)) df ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=3} ```{=html}
